title: Fix findFirst() off-by-one without breaking findLast() / findIndex()
prompt: src/list-helpers.ts has an off-by-one in `findFirst` (skips the last element). `_iterate` already documents an inclusive [from,to] range — the bug is at the call site inside `findFirst`, not inside `_iterate`. Make the minimal fix so tests/target.test.ts passes; tests/regression.test.ts must keep passing. Confine the change to src/list-helpers.ts and don't touch tests.
